personalization.projectOverview: Leads land in five different inboxes and get lost in reps' private threads — there's no single source of truth, no shared statuses, and no way to catch a deal going cold. The goal is to bring every inquiry into one CRM, automate routing, and sync deals with your accounting so leadership sees the pipeline and the revenue in one view.
personalization.workConditions:
Payment: 50% to start, 50% on acceptance · Net 15
Weekly status call and a written progress report
Two revision rounds included on every stage
Warranty support: 60 days after launch

Accounting sync | Invoices, payments, product catalog
Telephony & messaging | Calls and threads on the deal record"},{"title":"Stage 3. Rollout & training","costRub":6200,"rows":"Team training | Two workshops + video guides
